no-restricted-syntax.message: Persona is a HINT, not a GATE (ADR-034 §3). Route handlers must not branch on persona — see apps/ui/lib/persona/README.md.
Persona is a HINT, not a GATE (ADR-034 §3). Route handlers must not branch on persona — see apps/ui/lib/persona/README.md.

Raw hex color literals are forbidden in audience route groups and components/shared/. Use design tokens via var(--hp-…) declared in apps/ui/styles/tokens/{brand,retailer,builder,deploy}.css (ADR-034 / ADR-035).

Raw hex color literals are forbidden in audience route groups and components/shared/. Use design tokens via var(--hp-…) declared in apps/ui/styles/tokens/{brand,retailer,builder,deploy}.css (ADR-034 / ADR-035).
Inline cubic-bezier(...) literals are forbidden. Use motion tokens var(--ease-base) / var(--ease-emphasized) declared in apps/ui/app/styles/tokens.reference.css (ADR-035 §52 / Issue #1058 L-6).
Inline cubic-bezier(...) literals are forbidden. Use motion tokens var(--ease-base) / var(--ease-emphasized) declared in apps/ui/app/styles/tokens.reference.css (ADR-035 §52 / Issue #1058 L-6).

`dark:` Tailwind variants are forbidden in audience route groups (ADR-035 §49 / Issue #1058 L-4). Theme switching is at the system-token layer via `light-dark()` in apps/ui/app/styles/tokens.system.css.

`dark:` Tailwind variants are forbidden in audience route groups (ADR-035 §49 / Issue #1058 L-4). Theme switching is at the system-token layer via `light-dark()` in apps/ui/app/styles/tokens.system.css.
`outline-none` strips the focus ring without a replacement (WCAG 2.4.7 / Issue #1060). Use `focus-visible:outline-[var(--sys-focus-ring)]` or rely on the `:focus-visible` rule in globals.css.
`outline-none` strips the focus ring without a replacement (WCAG 2.4.7 / Issue #1060). Use `focus-visible:outline-[var(--sys-focus-ring)]` or rely on the `:focus-visible` rule in globals.css.

forbid.message: Inline `style={{}}` is forbidden in audience route groups (ADR-035 §49 / Issue #1058 L-3). Use Tailwind utilities or co-located CSS Modules.

patterns.message: Atoms cannot import from molecules / organisms / templates (ADR-035 §53 tier discipline).
Molecules cannot import from organisms / templates (ADR-035 §53 tier discipline).
Organisms cannot import from templates (ADR-035 §53 tier discipline).
